overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, starting in a sunlit plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating, then transitioning into the shadowy urban canyon between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon billboards and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with food vendors and seating

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit plaza past red plastic chairs and food carts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at blue food cart with colorful umbrella

entered.detail: bright red plastic chairs arranged around metal tables in the plaza
food cart with blue base and colorful umbrella shading the vendor
large vertical billboard displaying a muscular figure with text
modern turquoise kiosk with digital menu boards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit plaza with red outdoor seating and multiple food vendors. The camera moves forward past a blue food cart with an umbrella vendor and a turquoise food stand, with palm trees visible in the background and a large billboard on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from plaza to urban street with tall buildings

events.description: exits open plaza and enters urban street with taller cyberpunk buildings
lighting shifts from bright direct sun to shadow as camera moves between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the shadow of tall buildings

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket browsing at turquoise food stand

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades towering ahead
zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
purple and white automated kiosk with glowing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza onto a street crossing, entering an urban canyon where tall glass buildings begin to obscure the sky. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the camera passes a vending machine booth and approaches the denser city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with holographic advertisements and neon signage

events.description: passing large tilted digital billboard displaying 'BIG' text
approaching ramen shop with giant holographic noodle bowl on roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit canyon between towering cyberpunk buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large tilted digital screen structure displaying 'IT'S BIG' text
restaurant with giant holographic ramen bowl and chopsticks on roof
tall glowing advertisement pillars with changing neon colors

segments.scene_description: Deep within the urban canyon, the camera walks between towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The scene features a distinctive tilted billboard and a ramen shop topped with a giant holographic noodle bowl, while pedestrians in colorful clothing walk through the shadowy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban thoroughfare with tram tracks and distant city landmarks

events.description: camera continues straight along the tram tracks toward distant structures

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street alongside tram tracks toward distant city structures

entered.detail: large futuristic building complex with archway visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a long urban street with visible tram tracks running down the center. Neon-lit buildings line both sides as the camera moves toward a distinctive arch structure visible in the distant cityscape, maintaining a steady walking pace through the cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air plaza into the oppressive, neon-lit depths of a towering urban canyon. It begins by gliding past red outdoor seating and colorful food carts under a clear sky, with palm trees and a large billboard framing the sunlit space. As the camera moves forward onto a street crossing, the open horizon vanishes and the lighting shifts into mixed shadows as glass skyscrapers begin to obscure the sun. The scene then descends further into the city center, passing a vending machine booth before the environment transforms into a dense corridor of towering buildings. Finally, the camera walks through the shadowy street beneath a tilted billboard and a giant holographic noodle bowl, surrounded by pedestrians in colorful clothing.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement down a sprawling urban corridor that draws the viewer deeper into the heart of a neon-lit cityscape. It begins by gliding along a long street where tram tracks carve a path through the center of the road. As the camera maintains a steady walking pace, the surrounding environment is defined by the glow of towering, neon-adorned buildings that line both sides of the thoroughfare. The scene then opens up as the perspective shifts toward the horizon, focusing on a distinctive arch structure that emerges from the distant skyline.
